justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with Bird excluding faceted filtering and MJ including it; both conflicting positions quoted with agent attribution in a clear table; escalation directed to Coach K for resolution (not Shaq); no handoff brief produced so no faceted filtering included; in-scope content (keyword search) correctly referenced as what Shaq would build if Bird's ruling stands; escalation asks the specific question of confirming scope for this release via three resolution options.

observations.text: Clear table format precisely attributes each agent's conflicting position
Explicitly refuses to produce a brief — does not smuggle filtering in as optional or future work
Explains why the conflict cannot be papered over — different interfaces, queries, and contracts
Provides three concrete resolution options for Coach K, all of which correctly frame the decision
Correctly identifies this as a binary scope decision, not a terminology mismatch

agent_output_excerpt:
